concept: Encourage / To Build a Bridge to the Heart
description: The act of giving support, confidence, or hope to someone. It is the process of building a bridge to another's core to help them find their own strength.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'ko' (core, center), 're' (a bridge), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'to build an open bridge to the core.' This frames encouragement as a profound act of connection that empowers another from the inside out.
